objective: Fixture: external_tool_activity present AND proper accepted test/review evidence present — completion gate must proceed. Proves it is the absence of proper evidence (not tool-activity presence) that causes denial.
acceptance_criteria: Completion is allowed when proper accepted test and review evidence is present alongside external_tool_activity references.

hard_rule_traces.description: External-tool activity does not block completion when independent accepted evidence satisfies all gates; tool-activity references are invisible to the evidence check.
hard_rule_traces.source: specs/012-v1-1-handoff-contracts/data-model.md llmdc Activity + Speckit Artifact; FR-018..FR-023; SC-007

external_tool_activity.limitations: Cannot approve evidence gates or record customer truth independently.
Analysis and checklist output is input only until accepted through the owning role and handoff evidence gates.
